features.name: Project Review Entrypoint
features.behavior: Establish README and docs navigation as a future-review map for the harness learning project.

steps: Review README.md and docs/index.md as the project navigation surface.

evidence.summary: Commit ba1544b added README.md, docs/index.md, and docs/evolution/index.md as the initial review entrypoint.

features.name: Harness Lifecycle Scaffold
features.behavior: Adapt the harness-creator lifecycle artifacts to this repo without overwriting the existing AGENTS.md contract.

evidence.summary: Added project-specific lifecycle artifacts; ./init.sh passed and the legacy structural validator returned 100/100.

features.name: Project Context Restoration
features.behavior: Fill CONTEXT.md with the durable project purpose, boundaries, terminology, and restart assumptions for future sessions.

evidence.summary: Expanded CONTEXT.md with the accepted five-subsystem model, product direction, evidence model, repository contract, and restart assumptions; ./init.sh passed.

features.name: Evolution Record Backfill
features.behavior: Backfill the first concrete docs/evolution stage record for the README and lifecycle bootstrap work.

steps: Review docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md for goal, evidence, conclusions, and next step.

evidence.summary: Added docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md with the required durable stage sections.

features.name: Template Boundary Review
features.behavior: Decide which lifecycle artifacts belong in reusable products and which remain project-specific to this learning repo.

evidence.summary: Published docs/workflows/harness-product-boundaries.md and ADR 0002; repository initialization passed.

features.name: Agent Operating Contract Slimming
features.behavior: Reduce AGENTS.md to a short root operating contract and move long OMX/generated reference material into docs.

evidence.summary: Slimmed AGENTS.md to 111 lines, moved OMX reference material into docs/workflows/omx-runtime.md, and passed both initialization and the legacy structural validator.

features.name: Learning Harness Summary Compression
features.behavior: Compress the long learning-harness research note into a concise five-subsystem methodology and execution lifecycle.

evidence.summary: Rewrote docs/learning-harness-summary.md from 1063 to 318 lines with seven sections and passed structural checks plus initialization.

features.name: Shared Harness Contract Core
features.behavior: Implement canonical schemas, capability rules, deterministic readiness inspection, and fixture contract tests.

evidence.summary: All 39 shared-core tests passed.
Self-inspection returned five Operational subsystems, no candidate bottleneck, and Effectiveness not-assessed.
./init.sh completed with shared-core tests and self-inspection enabled.
git diff --check completed without errors.

features.name: Harness Doctor Skill
features.behavior: Build the read-only doctor entrypoint over the shared core with canonical JSON and human-readable reports.

evidence.summary: All 25 Harness Doctor contract, renderer, and CLI tests passed.
Official skill validation completed successfully in the offline uv environment.
Repository Doctor JSON reported five Operational subsystems, no candidate bottlenecks, and Effectiveness not-assessed.
./init.sh completed with shared-core tests, Doctor tests, skill validation, and self-inspection.
git diff --check completed without errors.

features.name: Harness Creator Skill
features.behavior: Build the non-destructive creator entrypoint with conditional context restoration and check-first initialization.

evidence.summary: All 95 shared-core, Doctor, and Creator tests passed.
Official skill validation completed successfully for skills/harness-creator.
Repository planning returned a deterministic skip-only non-destructive plan with no blocked actions.
./init.sh completed with core, Doctor, and Creator suites plus both official skill validators.
git diff --check completed without errors; empty-directory CLI plan/apply/Doctor smoke also passed.

features.name: Harness Product Integration
features.behavior: Validate creator-to-doctor workflows across supported fixtures and non-standard project shapes.

evidence.summary: All 107 shared-core, Doctor, Creator, packaging, and integration tests passed.
Official plugin validation passed for the generated harness-engineering bundle.
Official skill validation passed for the packaged Harness Creator.
Official skill validation passed for the packaged Harness Doctor.
./init.sh rebuilt the plugin and passed all repository and packaged-product checks.
git diff --check completed without errors; packaged conventional, non-standard, conflict, resume, deterministic, and concurrent workflows passed.

features.name: Harness Field Validation
features.behavior: Run representative before-and-after coding-agent tasks and evaluate effectiveness without conflating it with readiness.

steps: node --test packages/harness-core/test/*.test.mjs tests/harness-doctor/*.test.mjs tests/harness-creator/*.test.mjs tests/harness-product/*.test.mjs tests/field-validation/*.test.mjs

evidence.summary: All four predeclared bare/harness coding tasks passed 3/3 tests after the first implementation edit with zero correction loops and zero scope violations.
The field result validator accepted pilot-001 as four complete runs with observed-only conclusions and Readiness capped at level 2.
./init.sh passed all product, plugin, skill, experiment contract, and field-result checks.
git diff --check completed without errors; the pilot supports durable-state and coordination-cost observations but no general Effectiveness claim.

features.name: Direct Plugin Installation And First-Run Validation
features.behavior: Provide a repository-local Codex marketplace and one-command installer, prove fresh-process discovery and packaged Creator-to-Doctor execution, and make partial Readiness recommendations describe only missing requirements.

steps: node --test packages/harness-core/test/*.test.mjs tests/harness-doctor/*.test.mjs tests/harness-creator/*.test.mjs tests/harness-product/*.test.mjs tests/field-validation/*.test.mjs

evidence.summary: Full core, Doctor, Creator, product, and field-validation suite passed 119 tests with zero failures.

The isolated real-Codex verifier installed the plugin, discovered both namespaced skills in a fresh process, applied Creator output, ran the generated init command, and returned the precise Doctor recommendation Add environment metadata.
./init.sh passed all suites, official plugin validation, both official skill validations, field-result validation, and repository self-inspection.
git diff --check completed without errors after implementation and state documentation updates.

Live installation registered harness-engineering@harness-engineering-local version 0.1.0+codex.local-20260627-165001, and a fresh Codex prompt-input process discovered harness-engineering:harness-creator and harness-engineering:harness-doctor.
